03

Why Freshness Matters

Actives degrade.
So we don’t delay.

Every active ingredient has a degradation curve. The longer a product sits before reaching you, the less potency remains. We built NeolabCare around a different model.

NMN (Liposomal)
GHK-Cu (Copper Peptide)
Hyaluronic Acid
Standard Formulation
Active potency retention (%) from date of production. Data modelled from published stability studies. NeolabCare dispatches within 7 days of production — you receive actives at or near peak concentration. Standard formulation curve is illustrative, based on typical retail shelf-life of 18–24 months.
Sources: NMN liposomal half-life ~7 months — Betsuno et al. 2025 · NMN stability in solution — PMC7238909 · HA aqueous degradation — ScienceDirect 2015 · GHK-Cu stability — SeekPeptides

05

The Science

Every active.
Peer-reviewed.

The formula came first. Every key active was selected against published research — not marketing claims. Tap any ingredient to see the evidence.

Liposomal NMN (2–2.5%)
NAD+ precursor · cellular energy · anti-aging core
▾
NAD+ levels decline with age, reducing cellular energy and accelerating skin aging phenotypes. PMC7238909 ↗
Liposomal encapsulation bypasses enzymatic degradation at the skin surface, enabling deeper penetration than standard topical NMN. PMC12048825 ↗
NMN supplementation shown to increase NAD+ concentration and mitigate oxidative stress and DNA damage. PMC10721522 ↗
GHK-Cu (Copper Peptide, 1%)
Wound repair · collagen synthesis · post-shave recovery
▾
GHK-Cu stimulates collagen and glycosaminoglycan synthesis, accelerates wound healing, and exhibits anti-inflammatory properties. PMC4508379 ↗
Particularly effective for micro-wound repair — the type of micro-trauma caused by daily shaving and barrier disruption.
Argireline — Acetyl Hexapeptide-3 (10%)
Dynamic wrinkle inhibition · expression line reduction
▾
Acetyl hexapeptide-3 inhibits neuromuscular signal transmission, reducing muscle contraction and the formation of dynamic expression lines. PMC11762834 ↗
Clinical studies show measurable reduction in wrinkle depth with topical application at 10% concentration. PMC9301720 ↗
Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides (10%)
Skin firming · barrier support · moisture retention
▾
Low molecular weight hydrolysed collagen penetrates the epidermis and stimulates fibroblast activity, improving skin elasticity and moisture content.
Provides structural support to the skin matrix, complementing the peptide complex for visible firming results.
Hyaluronic Acid (Low-MW, 1%)
Deep hydration · penetration enhancement
▾
Low molecular weight HA (20–300 kDa) penetrates through the stratum corneum to deliver hydration at the epidermal level. PubMed 25877232 ↗
Also acts as a penetration enhancer for other actives, improving overall formula delivery efficiency.
Glabridin — Licorice Root Extract (10%)
Brightening · hyperpigmentation · anti-inflammatory
▾
Glabridin inhibits tyrosinase activity, reducing melanin synthesis and improving hyperpigmentation and post-inflammatory marks. PubMed 34679221 ↗
Exhibits anti-inflammatory properties that complement the centella asiatica in the formula’s soothing matrix.
Centella Asiatica Hydrosol (25ml)
Anti-inflammatory · wound healing · barrier support
▾
Centella asiatica enhances wound healing through improved angiogenesis and stimulation of collagen I and fibroblast growth factors. PubMed 35328954 ↗
Saponins and flavonoids reduce erythema and have documented anti-inflammatory action on skin. PMC11510310 ↗
Tranexamic Acid (5%) & Panthenol (5%)
Acne scar fading · accelerated healing · anti-inflammatory
▾
Tranexamic acid inhibits plasmin-mediated melanin synthesis, effectively fading post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation and acne scars.
Panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) accelerates epidermal healing, improves skin barrier function, and reduces inflammation.
Ergothioneine (1%)
Cellular antioxidant · DNA protection · longevity active
▾
Ergothioneine is a naturally occurring amino acid with exceptional antioxidant capacity, protecting cells from oxidative damage and UV-induced stress.
Works synergistically with NMN to support cellular longevity pathways and reduce the visible signs of environmental aging.

The Story

Built by someone
who saw the inside
of the industry
and walked away.

“I spent years managing one of France’s most respected clinical skincare brands in China. I watched how products were formulated for retail shelf life, not skin health. I decided to build something different.”

NeolabCare was not built in a marketing department. It was built from 200+ hours of primary research — cross-referencing published formulas, reading clinical trials, and making deliberate choices about what to include and what to leave out.

Every formulation decision was made to maximise what reaches your skin. Not what survives the supply chain.

08

FAQ

Everything
you need
to know.

If your question isn’t here, email us directly. We answer every message personally.

Can I use it morning and night?+
Yes. We deliberately excluded retinol, AHAs, and other sun-sensitising ingredients, so the formula is safe for both morning and evening use year-round. Apply after cleansing. One product, twice a day, 30 seconds. That is the entire routine.
Is it suitable for post-shave use?+
Yes — post-shave recovery is a core design principle of this formula. The centella asiatica, GHK-Cu, and panthenol provide soothing, barrier-repair, and micro-wound recovery properties that make it highly effective immediately after shaving. Apply directly after shaving. It absorbs quickly, reduces redness, and does not sting on freshly shaved skin.
What is liposomal NMN and why does it matter?+
NMN (Nicotinamide Mononucleotide) is a NAD+ precursor — a compound that supports cellular energy production and is associated with skin aging research. Standard topical NMN is largely degraded by enzymes in the skin’s surface layer before it can penetrate. Liposomal delivery encapsulates the NMN in a lipid shell that bypasses this enzymatic degradation, allowing deeper penetration. This is why we specified liposomal form specifically, at an effective concentration of 2–2.5%.
When will my order ship?+
Your order will be produced after the campaign closes. We dispatch within 7 days of production completion — this is our commitment. Delivery timelines vary by destination: typically 5–10 business days for most of Asia, 10–21 days for international destinations. You will receive your production date and tracking number by email.
Is this suitable for sensitive skin?+
The formula was designed to be gentle — no retinol, no AHAs, no fragrances, no known common irritants. However, individual sensitivities vary. This is exactly why we include travel ampoules with every full-bottle order: test it on a small area first. If you experience any reaction, you haven’t opened the main bottle.
How does the subscription work?+
Subscribers on Tier 06 and above receive their next batch automatically — every 3 months for Seasonal, every 2 months for Bi-Monthly. We time the production and dispatch so your new bottle arrives before your current one runs out. No reminders, no manual reorders. You can pause or cancel at any time.
What does “produced to order” mean?+
It means we do not manufacture stock in advance. Each batch is produced specifically for the orders received. This is what allows us to eliminate shelf time entirely — there is no warehouse, no retail chain, no product sitting in a distribution centre. Your bottle is made for you, then dispatched directly.
